## Task Description

A clear description of exactly what needs to be done.

## Context

Why this task exists and how it fits into the project.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Resources

Relevant files, docs, or examples to help get started:

- File to modify: `src/fastkit_i18n/...`
- Related docs: [fastkit.org/docs](https://fastkit.org/docs)
- Contributing guide: [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
